summary: Discard orphaned dev-mode crash markers on startup

title: Skip xterm WebGL renderer when Chromium reports software-only GPU
summary: Skip xterm WebGL renderer when Chromium reports software-only GPU

title: Use privateBytes not workingSetSize on macOS — compression causes false positives
summary: Use privateBytes not workingSetSize on macOS — compression causes false positives

title: Chromium enforces 16 WebGL contexts per renderer — reserve headroom
summary: Chromium enforces 16 WebGL contexts per renderer — reserve headroom

title: Repository.pullRequests uses IssueOrder, not PullRequestOrder
summary: Repository.pullRequests uses IssueOrder, not PullRequestOrder

title: Circuit breaker backoff needs a cap and a success-driven auto-recovery
summary: Circuit breaker backoff needs a cap and a success-driven auto-recovery

title: Pre-check filesystem existence — circuit breakers can mask external deletions
summary: Pre-check filesystem existence — circuit breakers can mask external deletions

title: Use xterm's built-in padding option, not CSS padding on the wrapper
summary: Use xterm's ITerminalOptions.padding instead of CSS padding on the wrapper so the theme background fills the full gutter and stays in sync with custom schemes.

title: xterm onData fires for mouse/focus events — filter before treating as user input
summary: xterm onData fires for mouse/focus events — filter before treating as user input

title: Coordinate cross-store cleanup through onTerminalRemoved, not component unmount
summary: Coordinate cross-store entity cleanup from the owning store's onRemoved hook, not React component unmount — programmatic removal bypasses unmount.

title: Make WorktreeLifecycleService cross-platform (process groups, detached, PATH)
summary: Make WorktreeLifecycleService cross-platform (process groups, detached, PATH)

title: Use taskkill /T to kill orphaned PTY process trees on Windows
summary: Use taskkill /T to kill orphaned PTY process trees on Windows

title: Use native title bar on Linux (frameless breaks GNOME/KDE)
summary: Use native title bar on Linux (frameless breaks GNOME/KDE)

title: Pool xterm WebGL contexts instead of destroying on blur
summary: Pool xterm WebGL contexts instead of destroying on blur — shader recompile costs 85-230ms per focus switch, attach/release by tier not by focus.

title: Debounce terminal-title state changes — spinner frames cause rapid flapping
summary: Debounce terminal-title state changes — spinner frames cause rapid flapping

title: Filter ANSI CR-overwrite cosmetic redraws from terminal activity tracking
summary: Filter ANSI CR-overwrite cosmetic redraws from terminal activity tracking

title: Agent failed state must accept user input as recovery signal
summary: Agent state machine must never have a true sink state — always keep an input→working transition gated on explicit user action, never heuristic output.

title: Detect alternate screen buffer when restoring PTY sessions — don't replay vim/htop state
summary: Detect alternate screen buffer when restoring PTY sessions — don't replay vim/htop state

title: Flush PTY session snapshot BEFORE kill — debounced writes are cancelled
summary: Flush PTY session snapshot BEFORE kill — debounced writes are cancelled

title: Persist agent launch flags so session resume matches the original launch
summary: Persist agent launch flags so session resume matches the original launch

title: xterm terminal.reset() destroys scroll position — capture and restore across wake-restore
summary: xterm terminal.reset() destroys scroll position. Capture scrollBackOffset before reset, reapply via scrollToLine after write, gate on isUserScrolledBack.

title: Use null-byte delimiter in git log --format to handle pipe chars in commit bodies
summary: Git log --format pipe delimiter corrupted by | in commit bodies. Use null-byte (\0) delimiter in git log, guard isNaN dates downstream.

title: WorktreeRemovedError detection must cover 'not a git repository' from git worktree remove
summary: WorktreeRemovedError only caught ENOENT. git worktree remove produces 'not a git repository' with directory still present — enumerate all tool-error shapes for resource-gone, call onRemoved+stop not just error state.

title: CSP needs frame-src blob: and img-src https: for Gutenberg-style editors in webview
summary: CSP needs frame-src blob: and img-src https: for Gutenberg/rich editors in webview. Test CSP per-directive not against full concatenated string.

title: autoUpdater.quitAndInstall bypasses before-quit cleanup on macOS — call cleanup explicitly
summary: macOS autoUpdater.quitAndInstall closes windows before before-quit fires, skipping cleanup that needs mainWindow. Call cleanup explicitly before quitAndInstall in try/catch.

title: Focus trap must check closest aria-modal ancestor to avoid disrupting portaled popovers
summary: AppDialog focus trap broke nested Radix popovers (portaled outside dialog DOM). Check closest aria-modal ancestor before intercepting Tab; auto-focus via requestAnimationFrame with tabIndex=-1 fallback.

title: Buffer errors sent before the renderer is ready — never drop on a missing window
summary: sendError dropped when mainWindow destroyed or not did-finish-load. Buffer in memory (capped) + persist critical errors to electron-store, flush on did-finish-load, expose pull IPC for renderer drain.

title: Tag long-lived monitors with a scope id to prevent cross-project contamination after switch
summary: Long-lived monitors outlive project switch. Tag MonitorState with projectScopeId at creation, check on every emission point (update/delete/event handlers) — boundary filtering alone leaks.

title: requestAnimationFrame deferral on input submit creates a blur-race that drops user input
summary: Deferring Enter-to-send via requestAnimationFrame opens a blur-race window that silently drops input; keep submit paths synchronous and use setTimeout(0) for compositionend

title: electron-store v11 throws on store.set(key, undefined) — use store.delete()
summary: electron-store v11 breaking change: store.set(key, undefined) now throws; use store.delete(key) to clear a key, grep for the old pattern before bumping

title: preventDefault in before-input-event stops the key reaching the renderer — use setIgnoreMenuShortcuts
summary: event.preventDefault() in Electron before-input-event swallows the keydown from the renderer; use webContents.setIgnoreMenuShortcuts(true) to block native accelerators only

title: Duplicate CSS variable declarations in @theme inline let the later one win silently
summary: Tailwind v4 @theme inline does not deduplicate; duplicate --color-* declarations silently let the later one win, causing invisible theme/contrast bugs — grep before adding

title: Inline array in useEffect deps fires cleanup on every parent render
summary: Inline arrays from parent props are new references each render; a useEffect with them in deps runs cleanup every render — mount/unmount-only effects MUST have empty deps

title: Electron native Menu sublabel renders shortcuts on a second line — use Radix for inline hints
summary: Electron native Menu sublabel always renders on a second line; no API to show shortcuts inline — use Radix DOM context menus for modern inline-shortcut menus

title: Measuring .cm-line with getBoundingClientRect is inflated by chip/widget decorations
summary: Measuring .cm-line via getBoundingClientRect returns inflated height when a decoration/widget is present; use view.defaultLineHeight and guard style writes

title: backdrop-blur on an ancestor creates a containing block for position:fixed descendants
summary: backdrop-filter/blur/transform/filter on any ancestor creates a new containing block for position:fixed children; modals must be portaled to document.body

title: Register IPC handlers before loading the renderer to avoid startup race
summary: Register all IPC handlers synchronously before loadURL; use late-bound HandlerDependencies object for async-init services and make re-invocations idempotent

title: Dev preview URL detection broken by OSC 8 hyperlinks and C1 controls
summary: Dev preview URL detection must handle OSC 8 ST terminator, 8-bit C1 OSC (0x9D), and exclude 0x80-0x9f from URL character classes when stripping ANSI.

title: Windows COMSPEC is always cmd.exe — PowerShell fallback never reached
summary: Windows COMSPEC always equals cmd.exe, so env.COMSPEC||powershell fallback is dead code. Probe pwsh.exe then powershell.exe via where with timeout.

title: Linux clipboard file URIs and inotify ENOSPC handling
summary: Linux text/uri-list clipboard requires pathToFileURL() and RFC 2483 CRLF terminators. fs.watch ENOSPC needs both sync and async handling plus actionable sysctl message.

title: Ubuntu 24.04 AppArmor userns blocks Electron; Wayland needs Ozone flags
summary: Ubuntu 24.04 restricts unprivileged userns crashing Electron sandbox. Ship AppArmor profile via .deb postinst, and set Ozone platform hints before whenReady() for Wayland.

title: Windows path detection and HOME env variable pitfalls
summary: On Windows use path.isAbsolute() not startsWith('/'), use os.homedir() not env.HOME, and prepend Git-for-Windows install dirs to PATH since they are not in system PATH by default.

title: Universal macOS build fails on node-pty with lipo error
summary: electron-rebuild produces already-universal Mach-O for node-pty on Apple Silicon. Declare these binaries in build.mac.x64ArchFiles so lipo does not try to merge two fat files.

title: Wrapping ipcMain.on listeners must preserve removeListener identity
summary: Wrapping ipcMain.on listeners for security validation must track wrapped refs in a map so removeListener/off/removeAllListeners still work - EventEmitter uses reference equality.

title: Detect branch changes by reading gitDir/HEAD directly
summary: For instant branch-change UI updates, read gitDir/HEAD directly on watcher fire rather than polling git. Linked worktrees require watching gitDir/logs/HEAD not just commonDir.

title: Production source maps expose TypeScript source in distributed ASAR
summary: Production builds leak TypeScript source via sourcemaps - need Vite sourcemap:false, NODE_ENV=production on build:main script for esbuild gate, and clean dist-electron between builds.

title: Terminal resize SIGWINCH reflow spoofs ActivityMonitor into busy state
summary: SIGWINCH triggers TUI reflow bursts that ActivityMonitor misreads as agent activity. Suppress idle->busy transitions for ~1s after resize across all detection paths.

title: Ratatui TUIs (Codex) corrupt on rapid PTY/xterm resize races
summary: Ratatui TUIs (Codex/Gemini) corrupt on rapid resize. Skip post-wake bounce, atomize PTY+xterm resize in same frame, inject clear via xterm not PTY stdin, clear settled timers on detach.

title: Hardcoded line-height constants break at fractional browser zoom
summary: Hardcoded LINE_HEIGHT_PX breaks at fractional browser zoom. Measure lineHeight from DOM, use 2px epsilon tolerance, short-circuit empty documents, prefer Math.round over Math.ceil.

title: Dev servers print URL before accepting HTTP connections
summary: Vite/Next/Webpack print URL before HTTP listener is ready. After URL detection, poll with HEAD (accept 4xx) at 500ms up to 30s before loading webview - prevents ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED.

title: Identify main worktree by canonical path, not git output order
summary: Never identify main worktree by git output order. Compare canonical paths with realpathSync and Windows case-insensitive matching; fail closed if project root unavailable.

title: In-flight fetch promises can resurrect invalidated cache entries
summary: Cache-with-in-flight-promise patterns need ownership tokens — completing promises can write stale results back after invalidation and resurrect deleted entries

title: Webview dom-ready does not re-fire on already-ready webviews after remount
summary: Electron webview dom-ready does not re-fire on remount of an already-ready webview — probe getURL()/isLoading() on mount and add timeout recovery

title: xterm.js initialized with 0x0 dimensions when conditionally mounted
summary: xterm.js initialized inside conditionally-mounted container sees 0x0 dimensions — mount unconditionally and hide with CSS, never with {open && <Xterm/>}

title: Agent working-state missed because input bar splits body and Enter into separate writes
summary: HybridInputBar splits body+Enter into separate async writes — ActivityMonitor needs direct notifySubmission() calls at enqueue and dequeue, not byte-pattern heuristics

title: Dev preview URL detection stuck because SharedArrayBuffer bypassed IPC data events
summary: PtyClient 'data' events do not fire when SharedArrayBuffer is the active PTY output path — main-process observers need opt-in IPC data mirroring

title: Pooled PTYs start in home dir, not the worktree — bypass the pool for cwd-sensitive spawns
summary: PtyPool warms terminals in home directory, so dev-preview/cwd-sensitive spawns must bypass the pool and be guarded with runtime assertions

title: Git status cache TTL must be shorter than worktree poll interval
summary: Git status cache TTL must be strictly shorter than worktree poll interval — otherwise cache absorbs refreshes and UI shows stale data for multiple cycles

title: Virtuoso skips re-renders on stable keys — use dynamic keys for streaming items
summary: Virtuoso (and react-window/react-virtual) skip re-renders on stable keys — streaming items need dynamic keys encoding mutable state to force updates

title: ResizeObserver does not fire in overlay mode — explicit state deps needed for xterm fit
summary: ResizeObserver does not fire for overlay-mode sidecars (container unchanged) — xterm fit effects must explicitly depend on overlay state, not just container size

title: Race condition: terminal agents spawning before worktree directory exists
summary: git worktree add returning success does not guarantee fs.access sees the directory; use waitForPathExists with exponential backoff before spawning PTY into a freshly created cwd.

title: Preserve browser/webview panel state in dock across show/hide cycles
summary: Electron <webview> loses state on unmount; use a stable offscreen React portal target to keep dock panels alive while hidden rather than conditional rendering.

title: Activity tier desync between PTY host and renderer after project switch
summary: PTY-host and renderer tier state desynced on reconnect because snapshot had no activityTier; reconnect/hydration IPC must carry every state field the renderer would otherwise re-initialize.

title: Cmd+Alt+letter keybindings broken on macOS because Alt transforms the character
summary: macOS Option transforms letters to special chars (Alt+P -> π); derive key identity from event.code not event.key for Alt chords on mac, gated to darwin to preserve AltGr on Linux.

title: xterm.js renderer intermittently stops repainting after tier transitions
summary: xterm.js renderer can get visually stuck after tier transitions with no API to detect; force term.refresh after every wakeAndRestore path and add periodic health refresh while working.

title: Terminal resize clearing alt screen because of dual alt-buffer tracking with mismatched property
summary: Dual alt-buffer tracking (parser DECSET vs xterm onBufferChange) drifts silently; trust xterm.js first-party state as single source of truth, delete parallel trackers outright.

title: Zod schema for persisted panels dropped non-PTY panels by requiring PTY-only fields
summary: Persisted panel Zod schema dropped non-PTY panels by requiring type/cwd; use per-kind refinement, kind-inference fallback for legacy states, and single-pass hydration preserving order.

title: Routing agent output to IPC while renderer polls SAB drops the data
summary: Dual-transport systems (SAB vs IPC) must route and consume on the same single source of truth (polling state), not static attributes like terminal kind, or data drops.

title: Waiting on utility-process ready without reject handlers hangs app startup
summary: waitForReady() on utility processes needs explicit rejects for sync fork throws, early exit, and late-ready-after-death; otherwise app startup hangs indefinitely.

title: Concurrent request-response IPC needs unique request IDs, not per-terminal callbacks
summary: Request-response IPC must key pending callbacks by a unique requestId, not by the resource ID; concurrent callers otherwise overwrite each other's callbacks and cause hangs.

title: JSON.stringify throws TypeError on BigInt — crashes any log/diag viewer
summary: JSON.stringify throws TypeError on BigInt with no spec-level representation; safeStringify must handle BigInt, circular refs, Errors, and a top-level try/catch fallback.

title: Regex-based GitHub URL parsing truncates repos with dots in the name
summary: Regex-based GitHub URL parsing truncates repos with dots in the name (.github, my.repo); use new URL() and strip .git/trailing slash explicitly, with SSH form as its own branch.

title: redactSensitiveData stack-overflowed on circular objects and mishandled null
summary: Recursive object walkers need both WeakSet cycle detection and explicit !== null guards because typeof null === 'object'; applies to redactors, serializers, and deep-clone helpers.

title: Word-boundary regex does not match underscores — breaks secret detection
summary: Word-boundary regex \b does not match across underscores in ECMAScript, so /\btoken\b/ fails on GITHUB_TOKEN; use substring matching for secret-key detection.

title: IPC fallback path needs backpressure or agent output OOMs the main process
summary: Every PTY output transport needs bounded queuing with node-pty pause/resume at 90%/50% thresholds; IPC fallback path had no flow control and OOMed main on chatty agents.

title: Agent activity regex patterns need the 'm' flag for $ to match line ends
summary: JS regex $ only anchors end-of-string without the 'm' flag. Multi-line scan buffers require `new RegExp(pattern, 'im')`. Canopy centralizes this in compilePatterns — go through it.

title: Use a monotonic checkId to guard async refresh against stale results
summary: For async refresh with shared cache, issue a monotonic checkId at request start and only commit results if the id still matches — simpler than AbortController when the work can't truly be cancelled.

title: GraphQL variable named $query is rejected by @octokit/graphql
summary: @octokit/graphql reserves 'query' as the request-body key, so naming a GraphQL variable $query always fails. Rename to $searchQuery or similar in both operation and variables object.

title: Never fall back to process.cwd() for userData paths
summary: Never fall back to process.cwd() for userData paths; build platform-specific defaults from os.homedir() and validate env overrides as absolute. Otherwise cache files end up in user project roots.

title: Terminal echo during typing looks like agent activity unless CPU is validated
summary: Character echo during typing triggers output-based activity heuristics; require CPU validation (or pattern match) before output transitions agents to working. Keep input-based transitions immediate.

title: Non-bracketed-paste agents need output-settle, not fixed delay, before Enter
summary: For non-bracketed-paste agents (Gemini) use output-settle debounce anchored to submit start, not a fixed delay, before sending Enter — fixed sleeps drop characters under load or on large pastes.

title: MessagePort postMessage silently fails on non-serializable fields in nested state
summary: MessagePort.postMessage silently drops payloads that contain class instances / timers / functions; deep-clone snapshots centrally before sending across process boundaries.

title: CSP frame-ancestors in a meta tag is ignored and logs a warning
summary: CSP frame-ancestors (and sandbox, report-uri, report-to) are ignored in meta tags; only HTTP headers enforce them. Drop them from vite.config PROD_CSP to avoid console warnings.

title: PTY resize triggers TUI redraws that look like agent activity
summary: PTY resize sends SIGWINCH which makes TUIs repaint, producing output that tricks activity detection into flipping agents to working. Suppress output-based detection briefly after resize; still extend busy state.

title: Electron menu `role: reload` ships with a built-in Cmd+R accelerator you cannot suppress
summary: Electron menu role:'reload' bundles a built-in Cmd+R accelerator that cannot be overridden; drop the role and write an explicit click handler to have the menu item without the shortcut.

title: PTY backend crash recovery: close stale MessagePort, soft-reset xterm, reattach listeners immediately
summary: PTY backend crash recovery: attach listeners synchronously in constructor, close old MessagePort before replacing, soft-reset via DECSTR before xterm resetRenderer to avoid white-text glitch.

title: Per-terminal ACK flow control deadlocks terminals without an attached renderer
summary: Per-terminal ACK flow control deadlocks background terminals without a mounted renderer; skip it under SAB and let ring-buffer backpressure be sole throttle.

title: Radix Popover closes on Escape — terminals inside need onEscapeKeyDown preventDefault
summary: Radix Popover swallows Escape by default; terminals embedded in popovers need onEscapeKeyDown={e=>e.preventDefault()} so ESC reaches xterm/PTY without closing the overlay.

title: Electron safeStorage is main-process only — utility processes need memory-only token propagation
summary: Electron safeStorage is main-process only; utility processes need memory-only token propagation pushed via IPC on the 'ready' event (not 'spawn'), re-sent on every restart.

title: Activity/input detectors must honor bracketed paste or they treat paste newlines as Enter
summary: Input/activity detectors must track bracketed-paste markers (\x1b[200~/201~) and ignore newlines inside, buffer split escapes across chunks, and timeout-exit stuck paste state.

title: Branch names with slashes break filenames: sanitize before using as path component
summary: Branch names legally contain slashes/at/hash/dot but filenames can't. Sanitize to [a-zA-Z0-9_-], collapse dashes, cap at 100 chars, fallback to 'head' when empty.

title: System sleep/wake: debounced powerMonitor plus PTY output circuit breaker
summary: Sleep/wake needs debounced powerMonitor handlers (collapse rapid cycles) plus PTY output circuit breaker with cooldown. Otherwise health checks misfire and IPC floods on wake.

title: TSC dual-compilation race: two tsconfigs emitting the same shared directory
summary: Two tsconfigs emitting the same shared/ directory race and corrupt output. Fix with composite TypeScript project references and tsc -b; never overlap emit paths.

title: Environment-aware CSP via Vite plugin: strip localhost from production builds
summary: Vite transformIndexHtml plugin to swap dev vs prod CSP meta tag; fail build if tag missing. Prevents localhost CSP leaking into production Electron builds.

title: Windows worktree paths broken by forward-slash string splitting in renderer
summary: Renderer must never do filesystem path arithmetic; split('/') broke Windows worktree path suggestions. Move path.basename/dirname/join to main process via IPC.
